mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sys_dept ORDER BY order_num ASC , create_time ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_dept(parent_id, dept_name, order_num, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{parentId}, #{deptName}, #{orderNum}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW()) # useGeneratedKeys主键是由MyBatis主动生成的 keyProperty当插入成功后，MyBatis会将数据库自动生成的id自动赋值回传入的java对象的id属性中，这样在代码里能立即知道新数据的id是多少
mapper.select: SELECT count(1) FROM sys_dept WHERE parent_id = #{deptId}

SELECT d.id, d.parent_id, d.dept_name, d.order_num, d.status, d.create_time, d.update_time, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_emp WHERE dept_id = d.id AND emp_status = 1) as emp_count FROM sys_dept d ORDER BY d.order_num ASC, d.create_time ASC
